name: Chicken Ala Nancy
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound chicken into 2-inch chunks.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add garlic (crushed) and sauté until soft.
4. Add all other ingredients except artichokes.
5. Sauté, stirring frequently, for 15 minutes over medium to high heat.
6. Add artichokes and continue cooking until heated through.
